headline: AstraZeneca CEO: AI is affecting every part of our company
summary: AstraZeneca CEO Pascal Soriot joins CNBC’s Angelica Peebles to discuss the most promising drugs in AstraZeneca’s pipeline. He says the future is about innovating into new indications with the drugs and technologies they already have in house. He says in the last 3 years the company has averaged one positive trial result readout every month. As far as dabbling in AI, the company created a specialized AI unit to help accelerate research and discovery.

headline: GILD Reports Positive Results From Late-Stage Liver Disease Study
summary: Gilead reports positive phase III IDEAL results as Livdelzi boosts ALP normalization in PBC patients, supporting regulatory discussions.

headline: Assessing Gilead Sciences (GILD) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business scale Gilead Sciences (GILD) has seen its stock decline 2.7% over the past day and 4.6% over the past week, adding to a fall of about 3.1% over the past month and 13.9% over the past 3 months. Despite this recent pressure, the company operates at substantial scale. It reports about US$29.7b in annual revenue, net income of roughly US$9.2b, and a market value near US$162.8b, supported by a broad portfolio in HIV, viral hepatitis, oncology and COVID-19...

headline: Gilead Sciences, Inc. (GILD) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
summary: Recently, Zacks.com users have been paying close attention to Gilead (GILD). This makes it worthwhile to examine what the stock has in store.

headline: Gilead eyes PBC expansion for Livdelzi on positive one-year data
summary: Gilead has touted the potential of its liver disease drug in patients with high ALP levels, potentially expanding the drug’s reach across the PBC indication.

headline: Barclays on the top takeaways from the annual ASCO conference
summary: Barclays head of U.S. biopharma research Emily Field discusses the biggest themes she came away with from the annual ASCO conference, including RevMed's potentially game-changing treatment for pancreatic cancer.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Gilead Sciences (GILD) Expanding Liver And Oncology Drug Footprint
summary: In late May 2026, Gilead Sciences reported new Phase 3 post hoc data showing that Livdelzi produced high, durable reductions in key liver markers for people with primary biliary cholangitis, while also securing accelerated U.S. approval for Hepcludex in chronic hepatitis delta and a positive EU opinion to broaden Trodelvy’s use in metastatic triple-negative breast cancer. These advances highlight how Gilead is consolidating its position in liver disease and oncology by deepening evidence for...
